data.name: Strip Battle
data.detailed_description:
Get ready to bare it all and strip down opponents in exciting battles in this roguelike deckbuilding adventure, with 4 playable characters, lots of strategy and sexy action!

STRIP DOWN OPPONENTS

Destroy opponents clothing and underwear to defeat them in battle! Who needs to fight to the death when you can fight to the bare?

GET NEW CARDS BY DEFEATING ENEMIES!

By defeating enemies you get stronger and collect new cards to construct the perfect deck with the strongest synergies.

CLOTHING IS POWER, NUDITY IS FREEDOM

Equip different sets of clothing that grant many unique powers and find the best synergies.

A SEXY AND EPIC JOURNEY

Disrobe many sexy monster girls, the three powerfull baronesses and the usurper queen to become the new rightful Queen of Disrobia!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or superior
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Radeon X600 XT or GeForce 6800 GT
